title: The AI users who are actually winning don't prototype. They ship.
excerpt: Cat Wu, Anthropic's Head of PM, shared three insights on Lenny's Podcast that cut straight to why most people aren't getting real value from AI yet — and what the ones who are doing differently.

title: CFOs Are Starting to Code (and SaaS Companies Should Pay Attention)
excerpt: A finance exec I spoke with recently vibe coded his way to a credible replacement for parts of his Workday and Concur stack. The SaaS moats that held for a decade are narrowing, and vendors coasting on comfort are more exposed than they realize.

title: Don't Flinch
excerpt: Organizations that abandon agentic AI projects at the first stumble are making a costly mistake. The gap between 85% and 97% accuracy is a prompting problem, not a model problem — and the companies that push through are building real advantages.
